series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of applications or correspondence associated with cemetery registration.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper copy is imaged and indexed on the computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was imaged and indexed on the computer, then the paper copy is destroyed. ; Microform: Images on microfiche are to be permanently maintained. ; Electronic: Images on the computer are to be permanently maintained., Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Other ; Electronic: Other
